meaning: n.[动]头节(绿虫等)寄生蠕虫的幼虫,(绿虫等的)头节
examples: Each cysticercus consists of a cyst wall and a single scolex invaginated into the lumen.
The cyst is isointense to CSF on MR, and an eccentric scolex can be identified as a mural nodule.
Moniezia benedeni is composed of scolex, neck and strobila, it has a series of changes in the shape.
